headline: Kinross Gold Buyback Puts Capital Returns And Growth Plans In Focus
summary: Kinross Gold (TSX:K) has approved a new normal course issuer bid. The program authorizes the repurchase of up to 8.7% of the company’s issued shares. The buyback represents a capital allocation decision aimed at returning value to shareholders. Kinross Gold, a global gold producer, is moving ahead with a sizable share repurchase authorization that puts capital return in focus for investors. For a business tied closely to gold prices and mining costs, decisions around cash use can matter as...
